title: Isabukuru Ya Cyusa
description: Igitabo cy’abana bagitangira gusoma kivuga inkuru y’isabukuru ya Cyusa.

pages.text:
© 2020 CACTUS PUBLISHERS, P.O.Box 1810, Kigali
Abantu bose bahawe uburenganzira bukurikira kuri iki gitabo:
Kugisoma yaba mu buryo bw’ikoranabuhanga cyangwa ku mpapuro,
kugikura kuri murandasi, kugifotoza cyangwa kugicapisha mu mpapuro,
kugihererekanya yaba ku mpapuro cyangwa ku mbuga z’ikoranabuhanga
(iziriho cyangwa izizavumburwa nyuma) no kugihindura mu ndimi izo ari
zo zose. Abagikoresha ntibemerewe kugicuruza cyangwa kukibyazamo
amafaranga mu buryo ubwo ari bwo bwose, batabiherewe uburenganzira
mu nyandiko n’abagitangaje.
www.cactuspublishers.rw
ISBN: 978-99977-54-85-1
Cyusa akunda gukina umupira n’abandi bana.
Abana b’inshuti ze baramukunda cyane.
Ku isabukuru ye, nyina wa Cyusa aje ku mukangura ngo akarabe.
Mu kanya gato azana imyenda mishya ngo yambare.
Cyusa amaze kwambara yibuka ko uyu munsi ari isabakuru ye y’imyaka itatu y’ amavuko.
Asaba ababyeyi be gutumira inshuti ze kugira ngo basangire umutsima.
Cyusa n’inshuti ze, basangira umutsima banezerewe.
Inshuti ze zimuha impano zamugeneye.
Ababyeyi be na bo bamuha impano bamuteguriye.
Umunsi mukuru urangiye, Cyusa aherekeza inshuti ze, bishimiye ko isabukuru yagenze neza.

IBIBAZO
1) Hitamo igisubizo kiri cyo;
Cyusa akunda gukina iki?
a) Umupira
b) Amakarita
c) Kwihishanya

IBIBAZO
2) Uzuza iyi nteruro ukoresheje rimwe mu magambo wahawe;
Cyusa amaze kwambara yibuka ko uyu munsi ari isabakuru ye y’imyaka ______
a) itanu
b) itatu
c) icumi

IBIBAZO
3) Subiza YEGO cyangwa OYA;
Ese Cyusa nyina yamuzaniye imyenda ishaje?
YEGO
OYA
